name: Jon Ossoff
subject: There's so much at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
These issues are on the ballot: |
---
Friend, I know this is a trying time.

But the solution is neither worry nor despair. The solution is victory.
_And here in Georgia, where Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than against ANY other Democratic Senate candidate in the country -- I need your help to WIN!_
**You know how vital the Senate is. Supreme Court confirmations are on the line, and with it:**

* **Voting rights.** Already the Supreme Court has eviscerated the Voting Rights Act, and right-wing extremists are coming for more. The voting and civil rights laws passed during the Civil Rights Movement hang in the balance!

* **_Roe v. Wade._** We must defend the privacy of women's health care!

* **Health care access.** Partisan extremist judges could vote to gut the Affordable Care Act's vital protections in the middle of a global pandemic.

_These are the stakes, friend._

And the only way to defend our health care, our privacy, our voting rights -- the only way to ensure the Supreme Court remains an impartial body committed to the rule of law, and not an instrument of right-wing extremism -- is to WIN.

**[So please friend, will you chip in to my campaign right now so we can WIN in Georgia?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f0c/5b2c1286/3a67cd35/25f3f23c/2842094130/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_stake?refcode=em_2020_09_22_stake")**

| | [CHIP IN: PROTECT ROE V. WADE](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f0c/5b2c1286/3a67cd35/25f3f23c/2842094130/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_stake?refcode=em_2020_09_22_stake")

---
| [CHIP IN: PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f0c/5b2c1286/3a67cd35/25f3f23c/2842094130/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_22_stake?refcode=em_2020_09_22_stake")

With love,

Jon

name: Tom Cotton
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Pelosi's plan to impeach Trump AGAIN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Last time we heard from Nancy Pelosi, she was breaking California’s quarantine law to go to a hair salon. Now, she’s back in the news--she’s threatening to IMPEACH President Trump and Attorney General Bill Barr to try to stop them from nominating a Supreme Court Justice. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Last time we heard from Nancy Pelosi, she was breaking California’s quarantine law to go to a hair salon.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Now, she’s back in the news--she’s threatening to IMPEACH President Trump and Attorney General Bill Barr to try to stop them from nominating a Supreme Court Justice.

How would Pelosi’s scheme work? I’m not sure. In fact, Nancy Pelosi’s scheme doesn’t even make sense. There’s nothing in the Constitution that allows Pelosi to stop President Trump from nominating and the Senate from confirming a Justice.

The fact is, Nancy Pelosi is angry. And so is the left. They will do anything they can to try to stop us from filling this seat.

That’s why I’m fighting back.
Stand with President Trump and Senate Republicans http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Conservatives need to stand together and send a strong message to Nancy Pelosi. We need to show her that we won’t back down.

Will you pitch in to fight Nancy Pelosi, stop impeachment, and fill the seat? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

My Republican Senate colleagues and I are putting everything on the line to help President Trump fill the Supreme Court seat. We need your help.
In service, http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Tom Cotton http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.
Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM1MjI5MzgS1&kn=10&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/CottonSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43522938&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2&spReportId=MTg0MTg4ODM2NQS2

name: Team Hagerty
subject: We Must Fill The Seat
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jd/) September 22, 2020 **Hagerty's Statement On The Passing Of RBG** For more than two decades, Justice Ginsburg served on the Supreme Court, and she blazed trails for women and believed deeply in public service. President Donald Trump can - and should - nominate a constitutionalist to fill this Supreme Court vacancy; the future of our nation for generations to come depends on it.Read Hagerty's full statement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-r/)** **#TeamHagerty Stands With Law Enforcement** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-y/) Last week, Hagerty announced he has earned the support of over 100 members of the law enforcement community across Tennessee. Across the country, we are seeing violence and anarchy in several Democrat-run cities, as many leaders call to defund and dismantle police departments. It is unacceptable. In the Senate, Bill will fight for the men and women who stand on the thin blue line. They put their lives on the line every day to answer the call to protect and serve our communities, and I stand with them 120 percent.Read the full release [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-j/) **ICYMI: Under Trump, US Marks Historic Peace In Middle East** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-t/) President Trump and his Administration are making unprecedented, historic strides in advancing peace in the Middle East. In the last month alone, the Trump Administration has brokered and now signed two historic peace deals: between the United Arab Emirates and Israel, and Bahrain and Israel. These are critical steps toward stability in the Middle East, which set the precedent for peace and economic prosperity throughout the region. In the Senate, Bill will continue to work closely with the Trump Administration to ensure the U.S. continues to stand with Israel and work together for peace in the years ahead.Read the full editorial [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-i/) **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the United States Senate, we must reelect President Donald Trump for four more years and expand our Republican supermajority in Tennessee so we can continue to stand up to the radical liberals who want to make America a socialist country. **Are You Registered To Vote?** Early voting begins in only 22 days! Make sure you're registered to vote and are ready to support President Trump and Team Hagerty in the election this November. You can register and find out more information on your polling location [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-d/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Winchester Herald-Chronicle:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-o/) Trump supporters fill Tims Ford Lake for boat parade****[The Daily Times:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-b/) Senate candidate Bill Hagerty campaigns in Blount County****[WATE:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-m/) US Senate candidate Hagerty visiting Maryville on Tuesday****[WJHL:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-c/) Hagerty touts trade, foreign policy and economic development experience in Johnson City stop**
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-q/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-a/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-f/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-e/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jl/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jy/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xldidx-fuutjhhtj-ji/)

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Cory Booker Keynotes Three Star
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/booker-three-star-600w.png]Hello Peter,

Each year, the TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY celebrates the best of Tennessee at our THREE STAR CELEBRATION. This year is no different and we have so much to celebrate: the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment (Tennessee was the 36th state to vote yes and has been known since then as ‘The Perfect 36’), the 60th anniversary of the Nashville sit-ins and desegregation of downtown lunch counters, and our Democratic candidates and elected officials who represent the best of who we are.

Make your plan to join our keynote speaker SENATOR CORY BOOKER and DEMOCRATS FROM ACROSS THE STATE for this very special celebration of our past, our progress, and our future.

Tennessee Democratic Party | 2020 Three Star Celebration
Friday, October 2, 2020 | 6:00 pm Central | Statewide Via Zoom | Tickets: $25
Keynote: U.S. Senator Cory Booker (D-NJ)
Special Guests & More: TO BE ANNOUNCED

Tickets | $25 [https://tndp.org/3star/]
Sponsorships Available | $250 & Up* [https://tndp.org/3star/]

(*Sponsorships include ticket allotment, recognition as sponsor during promotion of event, and recognition during the event)
https://tndp.org/3star/ [https://tndp.org/3star/]

VISIT tndp.org/3star [https://tndp.org/3star/] FOR MORE DETAILS & BUY TICKETS

SEE YOU ON OCTOBER 2nd!
The TNDP TEAM

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217

subject: ICYMI: The United States Stands With Israel
body:
Peter,I wanted to make sure you saw my latest op-ed in the _Israel Hayom_ , highlighting the historic peace President Trump and his Administration is achieving in the Middle East. **Read My Full Op-Ed**[**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-y/) See more content like this **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-j/)** Unlike past U.S. presidents, both Republican and Democratic, President Trump has recognized that the path to peace in the Middle East runs through Israel.

The first U.S. Ambassador appointed by President Trump was Ambassador David Friedman's appointment as our envoy to Israel. President Trump and Ambassador Friedman took decisive steps to move our U.S. Embassy to Israel's rightful capital, Jerusalem - fulfilling the promise that so many past Administrations had committed - but failed - to deliver. By keeping this long-made promise, President Trump sent the rest of the world a clear message: The United States stands with Israel, and we will not tolerate those who seek to undermine Israel's sovereignty.

In the United States Senate, I look forward to continuing to work closely with the Trump Administration to ensure we continue to stand with Israel and work together for peace in the years ahead.Bill Hagerty

Republican Nominee for U.S. Senate | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-xbtjz-fuutjhhtj-u/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205

**Throughout his time in public service, Eugene hasn't just talked about reforms, he's delivered results.** Whether through his work helping to end the rape kit backlog in Pennsylvania, his audit of Pharmacy benefit managers that spurred legislation that will lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors across the state, or his efforts to hold politicians of both parties accountable, Eugene has proven he is an independent leader who will put the needs of his district first.

Eugene DePasquale will continue to wage these important battles in the halls of Congress as well as issues like **expanding access to affordable health care, ensuring our economy works for working people, and renewing our commitment to the centuries-long struggle for civil rights in this country.** But friend, Eugene can only win his race with your support. But, friends, winning this battle for the soul of America will take all of us, and I’m counting on you to do your part. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Throughout his time in public service, Eugene hasn't just talked about reforms, he's delivered results. Whether through his work helping to end the rape kit backlog in Pennsylvania, his audit of Pharmacy benefit managers that spurred legislation that will lower the cost of prescription drugs for seniors across the state, or his efforts to hold politicians of both parties accountable, Eugene has proven he is an independent leader who will put the needs of his district first. Eugene DePasquale will continue to wage these important battles in the halls of Congress as well as issues like expanding access to affordable health care, ensuring our economy works for working people, and renewing our commitment to the centuries-long struggle for civil rights in this country. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Rep. Krishnamoorthi is on Team Dani!
body:
| | |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04d993d25c99/rep-krishnamoorthi-is-on-team-dani?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | **I am proud to announce that Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi has endorsed our campaign for Congress! **

Congressman Krishnamoorthi has long been a fighter for the middle class and working families. He has used his time in Congress to address the climate crisis, defend the Affordable Care Act from Republican attacks, and fight for common sense gun laws. I know that I will be able to count on him to be a strong partner in improving the lives of the people of northern Illinois.**I can’t wait to get to work with him once I am elected.**

Click [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7fb4fd85f5&e=140a9b81e7) to join Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi in supporting our campaign.

Here’s what Congressman Krishnamoorthi has to say about our race:

_“Dani Brzozowski is a leader I look forward to working with in Congress. We will focus on expanding healthcare coverage to every American, bringing more good paying jobs to Illinois, and fighting to end corruption throughout our government. Dani will represent the people of the 16th District by standing up on day one for everyone. I am proud to endorse Dani for Congress."_

**It is so amazing to have so many members of the Illinois Democratic Congressional delegation behind me**. I know that with their support - and yours - we can win this race and unseat one of the House’s most anti-women, anti-LGBTQ representatives

[I hope I can count on you to join Congressman Krishnamoorthi in supporting our campaign to turn northern Illinois blue.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=37455fbb71&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Lisa Scheller endorsed by Kristi Noem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
LISA SCHELLER ENDORSED BY KRISTI NOEM

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Brooke Race
Info@schellerforcongress.com

ALLENTOWN, PA - Allentown businesswoman and Republican nominee for Congress in
Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District, Lisa Scheller announced today that
she earned the endorsement of South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem.

“Lisa Scheller is the clear choice for Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional
District. She has a proven track record of cutting taxes and creating jobs for
Pennsylvania. We need folks with Lisa’s small business expertise in Washington,
and under her leadership, Pennsylvania's economy will rebound and continue to
grow.” Says Governor Noem

Governor Noem has served as chief executive of South Dakota since January 2019
- the first woman in history to hold that office. Prior to her term as
governor, she served in the South Dakota House of Representatives and more
recently in the United States House of Representatives. During her tenure in
Congress, Governor Noem served on the powerful House Ways and Means Committee.
Prior to entering public service, Governor Noem ran a successful family ranch
in South Dakota.

Lisa Scheller has this to say:

“I am honored to have received an endorsement from Governor Kristi Noem. She
has an impeccable reputation of being a strong voice for the republican party
and the people of South Dakota. Noem exemplifies positive government management
and direction as she leads her state into a stable economy through this
pandemic. Like Governor Noem, I am committed to helping the people here in
Lehigh valley and protecting our American Dream, Personally Liberty, and
Equality of Outcome.”

Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: They will do anything to destroy the ACA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The Senate has never mattered more |
---
Friend,

For months, Mitch McConnell and David Perdue have failed to pass additional COVID-19 relief, while the emergency small business loan program expired, extended unemployment insurance ran out, and schools were forced to confront reopening without critical federal help.

**_But now McConnell and Perdue will pull out all the stops to confirm a Supreme Court justice as swiftly as possible -- because they're hell-bent on destroying the Affordable Care Act and overturning Roe v. Wade._**

**The Supreme Court is scheduled to hear arguments on the ACA _the week after the Election._**

**[Friend, the Senate has never mattered more, and this race in Georgia is the closest in the country. So today, please chip in whatever you can to defeat my opponent, Senator David Perdue, and save our democracy.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f02/5b2c1286/3a6fc9ae/25f3f087/2451994203/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_scotus_aca?refcode=em_2020_09_23_scotus_aca")**

body:
| | Dear , The path to the White House is through our Battleground State of Pennsylvania. People from all over our county are working together to achieve a Democratic Victory in our Battleground State to deliver the 20 electoral votes to ensure a resounding win on November 3, 2020! People like the "Gold Star Parent" Mr. Khizr Khan, are supporting our statewide campaign **Nina Ahmad for Auditor General of PA** so we can help in turn out voters for the Biden-Harris ticket. I am deeply moved to receive the endorsement of Mr. Khizr Khan who continues to honor the ultimate sacrifice of his son US Army Captain Humayun Khan, and so many others who fight so we are free. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/Jvhdq7Mh2VZz36az3hvOR7pMNF7yJj3XpX48Pygvxb0=) We cannot afford another term of Donald Trump who calls anyone who places their lives in service of others **' a loser'**. We must #SaveTheSoul of the America where I have found refuge, where my husband and I have put down our roots, raised a family and collectively work for a more "perfect Union". [**Whether it 's $5, $10 $ 20.20 or $100, Will you help me stand up for our values?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/9d3vwVRdwLl9FpeteEfPc5blzWuYA_M5eUM4Pa5cRbY=) Thank you in advance and I am excited to work with all of you to move PA forward, Dr. Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/WkTJichTKD2GLhyWIkxF45KNgtF8c1Kg5EEVZpL_TY4=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/81bl7skcSk_Ybhv_FDeFib17g5b2WdLVXkbilc4Mt3k=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/asP9pRH76rVNi7D_Do7i8tKwfZKSdU59oM0t686ER8Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/2siVSS5O26FurN7dfKS-kjKBiOsRyhSZnGKMk_vJ2qE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/shZbyM_vq2bT55pfonkTvGf_ZbSJVj7Q3mXjnIYprak=/6B0BLLhXvYh0Bcdj35WFd26vVEMQldXpJV92BEE9Mnk=?hl=en)

body:
And Sen. Cornyn called expanded coverage "a mistake."

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f04/7f51f7bc/45919a42/4efa6685/3547219122/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter: Expanded unemployment insurance ended over a month ago, even though since March, 3.5 MILLION Texans filed unemployment claims. Hardworking Texans are struggling, and Sen. Cornyn is not doing nearly enough to help them.

Instead of fighting for unemployed Texans, Sen. Cornyn called expanded unemployment insurance "a mistake," once again siding with special interest donors over the people.

He's downplayed COVID-19 from the very beginning, despite receiving committee briefings that showed just how dangerous the virus could be -- all the way back in February. Texans can't afford another six years of the same, and now we need your help!

**[Pitch in to help MJ defeat Sen. John Cornyn this November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f04/7f51f7bc/45919a42/4efa6684/3547219122/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200923.1nd__2160__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| Patriot,

Our first TV ad for the general election is going live this morning. **You can be one of the first to watch it! **

Click [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bd31cf601e&e=1050d051da) to watch it.

But we need help to keep this message on air. _**[Donate Now](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0c9a3ddf4f&e=1050d051da) to help us spread this positive message about Jake.**_

| It is critical that our message gets out, so we can win big in November!

Here are some ways you can help more people see this ad:
1. Send this email to 3 friends.
2. Follow us on Facebook, and [share this post](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e734c8a18d&e=1050d051da)[ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=768ed80948&e=1050d051da)with your friends.
3. [Donate](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=872b181085&e=1050d051da) to Jake's campaign.

As State Treasurer, Jake has returned over $80 million to taxpayers, because he knows every penny counts. You earned it, you should keep it. _**In Congress, Jake will work to jumpstart our economy with good-paying jobs from Main Street to the factory, boost take-home pay for Kansans, and bring our supply chain home from China.**_

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

---|---
|
Thanks to everyone who visited Froggie's last night for dinner in order to visit with our campaign.

body:
| | | |
---
---
**Join me on September 27th for Betsy 's Amazing Race!** [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) or contact Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/7p8lc3ftZDpSpd_K0XTMFYLS5DOHvS0hJ7i04dtcnZI=?subject=Betsy's%20Amazing%20Race)) Details below! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) **What is it?** I grew up working at a race track, and now I'm in a competitive race for State Senate. So I decided to find a fun, socially-distant way for folks to support the campaign, while exploring the district in their very own "racecar" **The Amazing Race is a scavenger hunt around State Senate District 18.** Grab your family and hop in the car. You'll begin at the starting line with your first clue. Solve puzzles that lead to locations and more clues. Finish and find out if you had the most points to win!I **Date:** September 27th **Time:** You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm **Location:** Meet and begin at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters _(2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio)_ then use your car to follow clues to locations around State Senate District 18! We want everyone to be safe on the road. Winners will be chosen for best team name and best decorated "racecar!" Fastest time does not mean you win! Take it slow and enjoy State Senate District 18! _**Tickets:**_ _All kids are free_ [Individual: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) [Multiple in a car: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) _(not including children-they 're free!)_ [Sponsor: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) [VIP: $500](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/tRGqAPenl_4cbhJIB5WrhBSjXTLceUQU82s9hrpTH-Y=) **_ Hope to see you there!_** _-Betsy_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/VvmnNG_bdZdO3TgFWiz2PZzgysdXAdwH_HvKv7813fE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/6lpyEihZAyGdiZ-08qPYI-IGPQnRQgcSeOfD-vJx_W8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/1IPGSUBCB2RYoT9EyZ3Pr29MPuX4vO50sQFGDWeYKNA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Wc-KEmjXLc9IKcaqXLc4WUoMKr20oM0NIDYEVJqIsbA=/uFq77ohn8TDIB_CtUXQ6SMWD1SBkaIz25E1mCLq71Go=)

Tickets: All kids are free = = (not including children-they 're free!) = = Hope to see you there! -Betsy * = = = = | Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader Friends of Betsy Rader PO Box 280 Novelty OH 44072 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =_

Friend, I am running for President because we are better than this.

We are better than the tax cuts to the rich that came at the expense of working families who deserve a fair shot.

name: Jake Best, Ossoff Press Secretary
subject: Friend, check out this article ➡️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We can't afford six more years of lies |
---
| | **[$10->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fe79/3752951432/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder?refcode=em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder&amount=10")**
---
| **[$20->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fe78/3752951432/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder?refcode=em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder&amount=20")**
---
| **[Other->](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fe7b/3752951432/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder?refcode=em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder")**
---

Hey friend, it's Jake, Jon Ossoff's Press Secretary.

Working with reporters is a big part of my job. I'm constantly in touch with them to make sure they have the most up-to-date information about our campaign -- and our opponent's, too.

This column in the Georgia Recorder is, simply put, **_perfect._** I couldn't have said it better myself. It dives into all the ways in which the David Perdue you see on TV bears no semblance to the David Perdue we've seen in Washington these past six years.

**[I want to share my favorite parts with you, but first, can you chip in $20 to Jon Ossoff's campaign to help us elect an honest leader?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fe78/3752951432/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder?refcode=em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder&amount=20")**

Thanks, friend. **_Now, check out the highlights of the column:_**

> There's a man on my TV set these days claiming to be U.S. Sen. David Perdue, but I sure don't recognize him. He's nothing like the David Perdue that Georgians have come to know over the last six years.
> On TV, we see a people-oriented, compassionate Perdue, trying to pass programs to help Georgians; in Washington, we've seen a Perdue who actually spent his first Senate term trying to gut social and health-care programs.
> The TV Perdue says he will guarantee affordable health insurance for those with pre-existing conditions, while the senator up in Washington has voted eight separate times to repeal or undercut the Affordable Care Act, which already provides that guarantee. To this date, more than 10 years after passage of the ACA, neither President Trump nor members of the Trump Party have explained how they would replace it.
> The Perdue on my TV set looks into the camera and tells us that "absolutely" we need police reform, calling for law-enforcement officers to be given de-escalation training and body cameras and to recruit police forces that look more like the communities they serve. The Perdue in Washington, on the other hand, has been a fawning supporter of Donald Trump, to the point of referring to Trump as "an American Churchill."
**Senator Perdue has had more than enough time to prove himself in Washington, friend._But this column says it all -- he doesn't have a favorable Senate record to run on, so he's running on a platform of lies._**

It's pretty simple, friend: We can't afford six more years of David Perdue's lies and heartlessness.

_We need your help to send him home._

**[Right now, can you rush a donation to Jon Ossoff's campaign so we can elect an honest Senator who will truly work for the people?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fe7b/3752951432/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder?refcode=em_2020_09_20_jake_recorder")**

__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__

If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f00/5b2c1286/3a96017f/25f3fd82/3752951432/VEsHAw/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

clean_body: We can't afford six more years of lies | | | "" | "" | "" Hey friend, it's Jake, Jon Ossoff's Press Secretary. Working with reporters is a big part of my job. I'm constantly in touch with them to make sure they have the most up-to-date information about our campaign -- and our opponent's, too. This column in the Georgia Recorder is, simply put, perfect. I couldn't have said it better myself. It dives into all the ways in which the David Perdue you see on TV bears no semblance to the David Perdue we've seen in Washington these past six years. "" Thanks, friend. Now, check out the highlights of the column: There's a man on my TV set these days claiming to be U.S. Sen. David Perdue, but I sure don't recognize him. He's nothing like the David Perdue that Georgians have come to know over the last six years. On TV, we see a people-oriented, compassionate Perdue, trying to pass programs to help Georgians; in Washington, we've seen a Perdue who actually spent his first Senate term trying to gut social and health-care programs. The TV Perdue says he will guarantee affordable health insurance for those with pre-existing conditions, while the senator up in Washington has voted eight separate times to repeal or undercut the Affordable Care Act, which already provides that guarantee. To this date, more than 10 years after passage of the ACA, neither President Trump nor members of the Trump Party have explained how they would replace it. The Perdue on my TV set looks into the camera and tells us that "absolutely" we need police reform, calling for law-enforcement officers to be given de-escalation training and body cameras and to recruit police forces that look more like the communities they serve. The Perdue in Washington, on the other hand, has been a fawning supporter of Donald Trump, to the point of referring to Trump as "an American Churchill." Senator Perdue has had more than enough time to prove himself in Washington, friend.But this column says it all -- he doesn't have a favorable Senate record to run on, so he's running on a platform of lies. It's pretty simple, friend: We can't afford six more years of David Perdue's lies and heartlessness. We need your help to send him home. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for being with us, Jake Best Press Secretary Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

2020 has not been easy. Hardworking Granite Staters have lost jobs, small business owners have been forced to close up shop, and many folks are struggling to make ends meet.

**Tax hikes will only make it harder.**

In Congress, Pappas has been trying to raise taxes on the middle class. And now, at a time when Granite Staters need every dollar, he wants to create a new state income tax.

Governor Sununu has always opposed a state income tax, and he’ll continue working to cut taxes for working families. But he needs a teammate in Congress who will do the same.

**I will be that teammate, friend.**
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Make a difference this Saturday
body:
The closer we get to Election Day, the more opportunities there are to get out and make a difference in Indiana and America’s future. We are off.... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/make-a-difference-this-saturday?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bacf528d14&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republicans,

The closer we get to Election Day, the more opportunities there are to get out and make a difference in Indiana and America’s future.

**We are officially ****41** **days away from**** Election Day, and early voting starts in just 13 days!**

This means we need as many Hoosier Republicans like you as possible out sharing our message with voters. With issues like jobs, the economy, health, and the future of our country on the line, it’s never been more important to make sure Republicans win this election.

And we've got a great opportunity this Saturday for you to either help make phone calls to voters from your home and/or safely go door-to-door in your community.

**Would you be willing to participate in this Super Saturday?**

This Saturday, **September 26th** we'll be out talking with voters – and we’d love for you to be there. Indiana has been on a roll under Republican leadership and we can't let Democrats move Indiana backward.
[**\-- > Click here to sign up for Super Saturday <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48faebd33b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
When you [sign up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ac79ff5fd2&e=1acd9bb3d6), a member of our team will reach out to you. They'll provide you with all the information you need to have a successful day representing our Indiana Republican team.

One of the most effective ways to make a difference in this election is by getting out and talking with voters! **There are only**** 41 days until the election \-- so let's work together toward the same cause to ensure Republican success in November.**

-Your Indiana Republican Party

---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d006f4a76&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: The closer we get to Election Day, the more opportunities there are to get out and make a difference in Indiana and America’s future. We are off.... | | | | | | | Hoosier Republicans, The closer we get to Election Day, the more opportunities there are to get out and make a difference in Indiana and America’s future. We are officially 41 days away from Election Day, and early voting starts in just 13 days! This means we need as many Hoosier Republicans like you as possible out sharing our message with voters. With issues like jobs, the economy, health, and the future of our country on the line, it’s never been more important to make sure Republicans win this election. And we've got a great opportunity this Saturday for you to either help make phone calls to voters from your home and/or safely go door-to-door in your community. Would you be willing to participate in this Super Saturday? This Saturday, September 26th we'll be out talking with voters – and we’d love for you to be there. Indiana has been on a roll under Republican leadership and we can't let Democrats move Indiana backward. When you , a member of our team will reach out to you. They'll provide you with all the information you need to have a successful day representing our Indiana Republican team. One of the most effective ways to make a difference in this election is by getting out and talking with voters! There are only 41 days until the election \-- so let's work together toward the same cause to ensure Republican success in November. -Your Indiana Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200 Indianapolis, IN 46204 * USA

Ben Ray and the Left see judges and justices as nothing more than politicians in robes, there to use the Court to push their liberal agenda, like banning and confiscating all firearms. clean_body: | | | | Peter, Ben Ray Lujan’s fellow liberal leaders in DC are so furious over President Trump appointing a third justice to the Supreme Court that they are threatening to destroy the very credibility of the institution — they have said they will “Pack the Court”, adding as many liberal activist judges as it takes to shift the ideological makeup of the Court to the far Left. Here’s why — the Left is pushing a radical socialist agenda and they need a Supreme Court to green light their unconstitutional agenda, like banning and confiscating firearms and stripping away our other freedoms. We CANNOT allow that to happen. And that means we MUST win this Senate seat to maintain a Republican majority. | If you want to keep the majority in the US Senate, help me STOP Ben Ray Lujan’s fellow liberal leaders in DC from abusing their power and packing the Court by contributing $25 to our campaign. With your contribution we can defeat Ben Ray Lujan and stop the Democrats from tearing down our institutions. | | | Together, we have the opportunity to ensure that we protect the credibility of the Supreme Court and confirm justices that interpret the law, rather than make it up. Ben Ray and the Left see judges and justices as nothing more than politicians in robes, there to use the Court to push their liberal agenda, like banning and confiscating all firearms. Make no mistake — those are the types of judges he’ll vote to confirm if elected. "Please contribute $10, $20, or even $50 to my campaign so we can keep the Left from packing the Court with far-left, activist judges." Thank you so much for your support, Mark P.S. Radical Democrats are proposing “packing the court”, which means that they would add far-left judges to ensure the Supreme Court will push their liberal agenda. If Ben Ray Lujan is elected, they might be able to do it. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Johnson & Johnson Launches Massive Human Trial of COVID-19 Vaccine
body:
Johnson & Johnson’s vaccine candidate is the fourth to enter Phase 3 clinical testing. "The Trump administration, through its ‘Operation Warp Speed,’ | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee64b295d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Johnson & Johnson Launches Massive Human Trial of COVID-19 Vaccine**

“Johnson & Johnson launched a massive human trial of its coronavirus vaccine [today], paving the way for another option as the U.S. preps an immunization campaign to defeat the pandemic,” Tom Howell Jr. reports for _The Washington Times_.

“The Trump administration, through its ‘Operation Warp Speed,’ is offering unprecedented support to private drugmakers as it tries to lock down a successful vaccine before the end of the year.”

Johnson & Johnson’s vaccine candidate is the fourth to enter Phase 3 clinical testing.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d867e99909&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “White House adviser Ivanka Trump and Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross will present the inaugural Pledge to America’s Workers Presidential Awards to companies including Volkswagen Group of America and Lockheed Martin at the White House [today] . . . Most of the recipients have pledged to offer thousands or hundreds of thousands of training opportunities,” Evie Fordham reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e31bdcf028&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Trump signed an executive order expanding a ban on government agencies receiving sensitivity training involving critical race theory to federal contractors . . . The executive order says the government has prohibited federal contractors from ‘engaging in race or sex discrimination and required contractors to take affirmative action to ensure such discrimination does not occur,’” Mark Moore reports in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=548b0580dc&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:**[**President Trump is Fighting Division in Our Federal Workplaces**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f36661063d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “U.S. Attorney General William Barr lauded the efforts of law enforcement officers in Operation Legend on Tuesday as new charges were brought against 26 people who were allegedly involved in a violent drug ring out of Milwaukee . . . Operation Legend has led to 3,500 arrests—about 200 of which, were for homicide,” Bradford Betz reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3989861dac&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4164627384&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2c13d8fdf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7e0769667b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Rob Portman
subject: Where do you stand?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
The other day, I reached out to you requesting you to fill out a super quick survey. It’s a yes or no question, and will take you only about 20....... Peter,

The other day, I reached out to you requesting you to fill out a super quick survey. It’s a yes or no question, and will take you only about 20 seconds, but, I need you to fill it out quickly. When the Far-Left says that we have strayed from our morals, no longer believe in our nation, and are not proud of it, I want to be able to show them these numbers RIGHT HERE. So, I’ll ask you again, Peter, are you proud of America? [**I STAND FOR AMERICAN VALUES**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=3afef089416447659e925eae2bbe4d81&_e=hyJjN-9tnF0WaDZXu21ZSWsGIUiOoSEFtv6gL_1bRFKCdXqOWym-C06uJPpiGByMcVWqK_k-Mj4EKUW3clSnSiqYbim1fW2jLzdjHnUBHo267INS4b4b_P8MR0Te_oFjdvytwNt0jASIB7-bh7WW0yz5R1AnAtuv94Kbu8_O1iQI8VPFHn1GrXi0DcqujT_j-8cA6s_FFmyHTRfq7gObCHyuBUFO8_885Sp9t59Y0W9Ke0_PRizkEebwgic6cMBt960UPNs0aEyViEe0VCH0kQw4nCE5N4scDym4ZYme50mr4DGNh2e63ujGTbrAvCya8ZuUaUDFaPMQGN27vCtyjLst4cqZeSQGiXN7pdPOccJ9coa-OC0tMlnQP_n7BuQCrCloOwhDbGcdGFafOc54sWIF2T9KQ_uuDgatrO4qQd1nw2CDAFGNQeBd7uZlpxh6) [**I STILL BELIEVE IN AMERICA**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=3afef089416447659e925eae2bbe4d81&_e=hyJjN-9tnF0WaDZXu21ZSWsGIUiOoSEFtv6gL_1bRFKCdXqOWym-C06uJPpiGByMcVWqK_k-Mj4EKUW3clSnSiqYbim1fW2jLzdjHnUBHo267INS4b4b_P8MR0Te_oFjdvytwNt0jASIB7-bh7WW0yz5R1AnAtuv94Kbu8_O1iQI8VPFHn1GrXi0DcqujT_j-8cA6s_FFmyHTRfq7gObCIojC1Cuo-PNziZp7ZmNZp8-i-NJtr7lnnMXIgL1AwwJCuAxZ8qN9hL8cNUDnslJoYE9PWT_dg_TMPjmtyAR_HQn6kafbgXo9jYBLyMTDmwjMLpekm4bVxnafYkJAC9VuO5CnHHf-n2lZlP4mdU45irAfakkxPUrVPp-gdVvaZst_O_9dFhVcwxpbcC7YMwLAFbG69Norm-IzW6aEVaJedlQcHHzpR0bmIeGGFTor9iJ) Peter, we need more patriots like you. name: Ben Resnik, Defeat Disinfo
subject: What Friday evening means for Tuesday
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMT0tjgHLwl42kggliWsC6yiM9exN3lX2oF4gW-3IWsXkJ7MV4VEmuPgP0-qWwMNtbubUiXfXCsTOJ3brl0pBsMAyyhyX6l5yoaMJJWQWDd1oD8hKdIKjHcsc9CIaPyeJtZ/35f/cAk44gTWQDKErpgh7Yb_Bg/h0/kubXsIJDdKcKUThYMfo4Jh7PpAKVSRo7MU0rXKfdbjA) Team —

Friday evening, news of Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s death sent shockwaves through American politics.

Before we had time to digest this monumental loss, the inevitable conversation as to who would fill her vacant seat had already begun and Mitch McConnell had announced his intention to put Trump’s nominee before the Senate floor.

Within the digital discourse that followed, Democrats and Republicans sparred back and forth. Many clung to the developments they liked while calling developments they didn’t “hoaxes” and “fake news.”

**Despite this discourse — one heavily layered in disinformation — it is critical that we stay the course.**

The best thing we can do to honor the legacy of RGB is to defeat Trump in November, and begin to repair the harm that he has wrought on America. With a mere six weeks until the election, we must keep doing what we do best, dialing in on the outreach we know to be effective.

**Tomorrow, Donald Trump hits Jacksonville, Florida for another maskless rally.**

We’ve already been sharing the truth about COVID-19 to moderate voters throughout the city, warning them of the dangers that this virus presents across all demographics and political biases.

**When you make a contribution today, you help us reach swing voters with the truth about COVID-19.** We won’t swing every swing voter in America, but for those we reach **through your support** , our conversion rate will be remarkably high.

**[ $10 alone can push our content to 1,500 Pennsylvanians. clean_body: | | | Team — Friday evening, news of Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s death sent shockwaves through American politics. Before we had time to digest this monumental loss, the inevitable conversation as to who would fill her vacant seat had already begun and Mitch McConnell had announced his intention to put Trump’s nominee before the Senate floor. Within the digital discourse that followed, Democrats and Republicans sparred back and forth. Many clung to the developments they liked while calling developments they didn’t “hoaxes” and “fake news.” Despite this discourse — one heavily layered in disinformation — it is critical that we stay the course. The best thing we can do to honor the legacy of RGB is to defeat Trump in November, and begin to repair the harm that he has wrought on America. With a mere six weeks until the election, we must keep doing what we do best, dialing in on the outreach we know to be effective. Tomorrow, Donald Trump hits Jacksonville, Florida for another maskless rally. We’ve already been sharing the truth about COVID-19 to moderate voters throughout the city, warning them of the dangers that this virus presents across all demographics and political biases. When you make a contribution today, you help us reach swing voters with the truth about COVID-19. We won’t swing every swing voter in America, but for those we reach through your support , our conversion rate will be remarkably high. Thank you for being part of the fight. Ben Resnik Treasurer Defeat Disinfo If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: Last Night in Pittsburgh...
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.144089.aspx)
Dear Peter,
I am so excited to share this video with you! I was in Pittsburgh last night with our President and the thousands of people who came out to the airport rally. It was an incredible experience to walk out of Air Force One with the Commander in Chief to the roars of freedom loving Pennsylvanians here to support our President.
We desperately need to get our President re-elected and regain control of the House. You have been so generous to me before and I'm so incredibly grateful and humbled to call you "friend". We are gearing up to launch our first ad campaign and your help would be greatly appreciated. Please consider donating! We are in this to WIN! Click on the picture below to watch the video!
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/44.144089.aspx)

My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.144089.aspx)

Your contributions are greatly appreciated!

| Trail Update

| Friends, It was a great night at the Marion REC this week! I had the chance to talk about the importance of Republicans winning over college-educated women and how Team Kat is helping other Republicans in competitive seats so we can take back the House! It was wonderful to hear from the constituents about what matters most to them in these unprecedented times.

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, It was a great night at the Marion REC this week! I had the chance to talk about the importance of Republicans winning over college-educated women and how Team Kat is helping other Republicans in competitive seats so we can take back the House! It was wonderful to hear from the constituents about what matters most to them in these unprecedented times. | == | With less than 45 days to go, my team and I are busy every single day traveling the district and working towards victory. I hope to see you out on the trail. If you see me or a member of my team, please stop and say hello - we would love to hear from you! God Bless, Kat | Building Team Kat | == | | I am proud to have Susan B Anthony List's endorsement. They released a statement saying: "Kat Cammack is a model of the authentic pro-life, pro-woman leadership our organization exists to promote." | | | | | I am also honored to have the endorsement from Sheriff Brad Whitehead. He released a statement saying: "With law enforcement under attack on the national stage, it is imperative that we elect a representative for Washington that supports our law enforcement." | == | On Social Media | == | | Our Constitution represents who we are. It represents our American values and the foundations laid out for us by our Founding Fathers. It reminds me of the patriots who fought to give us what we have now, life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness! | | | | | Last Friday was National POW-MIA Remembrance Day. As the granddaughter of a prisoner of war during World War II, this day of remembrance is especially close to my heart. | == | How You Can Help | == | Join Team Kat As we head to the General Election in November, we need help spreading our winning message. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | | | | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | == | | | | == | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory in November! name: Bobby Jindal
subject: New Article: "Don't Give In to Democrats' Supreme Court Extortion"
body:
[ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=c9d3c707ed114b84979152fc07c44d78&_e=N7gg37-i4Bcv7OLHQPJPi8eKda_PmsRzNPwZSZSWqZosEdcmH6RPEEvnxWlyzptpSrsSMbhsMCNkh7KX25Q_cFNhHZwBEP0aDMpPFAy8VZwbLcX-FoNBE_C9sdpheWtEg-FfJRRJRxPnN8BQfbQ7aRm_MlLKYelsGqEhuf559GrXYvhvQi1_DWzDhmJPg8T7mf3e3la6ZvZcxrRx4Cv2CJXAIUFJazLO6EUlN71Qsg0PgkC4ziSzZ1Y4Ml68ijiY) I hope you had a chance to read my latest article, _Don’t Give In to Democrats’ Supreme Court Extortion._ If Republicans give in to Democratic extortion, it will never end, and they will forfeit the authority to govern—along with the support of the voters who make up their electoral base. The best way to reduce the intensity of fights over judicial nominations is for the other branches of government to reclaim their constitutional powers. Liberal judges have assumed too much power; they want to write the laws, not just interpret them. [Click here to read the full article.](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=c9d3c707ed114b84979152fc07c44d78&_e=P1yhCUJyIZc2gp4rNBKfRvbJbPP_wS5C6Dx6wpvteGn2qm5RfaiLs_SAb-C-RCUdQWx5oXwFQQN-n3J8KHAtNa9wTha7oZALchF53IB4OKALI9vFJNAueTTVNXGXfSPiytGEsM5hcm1bYxcg2takv6Gf-OZ_sKguS44rR2aLe0H4cecceeGnQ4OWdmUPPmcQS0rqDwN9o9NCsittz6bsG9lIbja6CQq7JWmPPG5Y-E7n-3W5Z7T0ht7yRzsOGVs83vpaMtDZt2dZSwAYV84-fhlGmoFFp5pcvAuvBBqcVU34KM1bYm0Sck0SVELrRMKniEG7Y6rKsGPKhHdZUduzdt3TYeF1BXDy5o23MEty_i-NSb4D0-HS0aRgq8EOyshj) Sincerely, Bobby Jindal Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320 [Click here to unsubscribe.](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=c9d3c707ed114b84979152fc07c44d78&_t=HRdIOXVj0bRhFi5IEtpiUywtW4jjzNHcXA2QDrDbzMZj-sKOoMyp6J1TEHMZEcQ90PexuKZBZb2J-UCkFngj21ZbaAA1nS383e5iyxuK8e0-r2xQ3lOB9a4HvlGBByxSPSFf9WazLgUqFGIHsSL7J24vEbWsU873GwgutNBCkrE%3D)

clean_body: I hope you had a chance to read my latest article, Don’t Give In to Democrats’ Supreme Court Extortion. If Republicans give in to Democratic extortion, it will never end, and they will forfeit the authority to govern—along with the support of the voters who make up their electoral base. The best way to reduce the intensity of fights over judicial nominations is for the other branches of government to reclaim their constitutional powers. Liberal judges have assumed too much power; they want to write the laws, not just interpret them. subject: Support Montana. Support Our Law Enforcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA REPUBLICAN
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# _Back The Blue_
**Now more than ever it's time to show our strong grassroots support. ** **We must continue to spread our message- We love our country, we will fight for our freedoms, and we will always back the blue!** **As a combat veteran, I know how important it is to back the men and women who sacrifice daily to protect our freedoms and security abroad. I also know how important it is to back the same men and women who are our next-door neighbors, who wake up daily and put on the badge that represents their oath to serve and protect our communities. We must support our law enforcement! ** **Help us defend our American heritage hard-fought and won by the generations before us._It is important that Republicans and conservatives turn out in record numbers and vote red up and down the ballot to preserve the American way of life._** **Once elected I will work with all Montanans and those elected to serve Montana. I will never waiver in my commitment to put Montanans first and do everything in my power to fight for and back our Law Enforcement. ** **_If you are able, please consider donating to my campaign today._ Even $5, $10, or $25 makes a huge impact to help ensure that we are able to run this campaign past the finish line and continue supporting everything that America stands for. For those who can contribute more- $100, $200, or even $360, thank you as well! ** **Best, ** **Troy Downing**
---

body:
We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251bd/45c30650/1c1d62fce/66e8fb40/2620562984/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make your first contribution to Warren Democrats. But first, we wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now.

There are only 41 days until Election Day, and people across the country are already casting their ballots. Everything is on the line: Taking back control of the White House, regaining a majority in the Senate, and protecting the future of our Supreme Court.

We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns that can use an extra push.

**We're so grateful to have you on this team. We have big plans for the final weeks of this election, but we can only carry out those plans with the support of our strongest grassroots supporters like you.**

**[If you can, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to power our work in the final stretch of the election, help take back the Senate, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251bd/45c30650/1c1d62fce/66e8fb43/2620562984/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLXNlcHQyMC13ZWVrbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVjE3Rl9FR1JfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA5MjNfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-sept20-weekly?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV17F_EGR_GRM_T_20200923_V1S1_P")**

clean_body: We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns | | | "" In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make your first contribution to Warren Democrats. But first, we wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now. There are only 41 days until Election Day, and people across the country are already casting their ballots. Everything is on the line: Taking back control of the White House, regaining a majority in the Senate, and protecting the future of our Supreme Court. We can't leave anything up to chance. That's why this team is fighting each and every day to help organize in races across the country, fundraise for down-ballot Democrats, and volunteer for campaigns that can use an extra push. We're so grateful to have you on this team. We have big plans for the final weeks of this election, but we can only carry out those plans with the support of our strongest grassroots supporters like you. "" Thanks for everything, Team Warren | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
That's why he's dumping millions into Georgia |
---
I'll cut right to the chase, friend:

**Mitch McConnell is the epitome of all that's wrong in American politics today.**

_And there's a reason McConnell's super PAC has spent more money against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger in the country._

Victory in Georgia means the end of McConnell's majority.

**_This is the tipping-point state and the closest Senate race in the country._**

Your support has made it possible to come this far.

But McConnell and his allies are dumping in tens of millions and throwing the kitchen sink in a last-ditch effort to save his guy, Senator David Perdue.

**[This is not a drill, friend. This is the make-or-break Senate race. I know with overwhelming grassroots support, we can overcome the avalanche of money from McConnell's super PAC and WIN. But I need your help! Will you stand with me today?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fed/5b2c1286/3a990d6d/25f3faac/1849081566/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_mitch_aw?refcode=em_2020_09_23_mitch_aw")**

name: Margaret Good
subject: tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19476120/253257839/-940294256?refcode=092320-es-vbm-drop-series-6-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGJkY2E5YS1mMmZkLWVhMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OOfQXsxHD-byDS4pMkMdS-008_43N4E56KfSUhXgAMw=&emci=787377c5-a5fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=b8bdca9a-f2fd-ea11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

Friend,

Tomorrow is a big day for our campaign: Starting tomorrow, Vote by Mail ballots will be mailed to voters’ mailboxes here on the Suncoast. That means the first votes in this election will be cast in just days!

That’s why we need to step up our voter outreach efforts, so we have set a goal to raise $20,000 before tomorrow’s deadline — **to make sure we have the resources we need to get our message out to voters as soon as they receive their ballots.**

name: Team Carney
subject: ICYMI - Governor Carney Participated in Candidates Forum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/p5yDV052139tgwQ2qxM2-A==/PY66gZd5Smv3Rk5PcAKopQ==?midqs=zz2x9r-m2uG9LYB0i0Effw==)
---
**RECAP OF FORUM LAST NIGHT**

Last night, Governor Carney participated in the [first Candidates Forum](https://act.myngp.com/el/p5yDV052139tgwQ2qxM2-A==/eIDEdqvsTMpQsne2QFOKVQ==?type=2&theater) of the election cycle hosted by Hadassah and the Jewish Federation of Delaware. Here are some key takeaways from the event:
* In a second term, Governor Carney will continue to lead Delaware through this COVID-19 crisis by trusting in the science and public health experts
* Governor Carney will continue to support small businesses and non-profits, and get workers trained for the jobs of the future as the economy recovers
* There are key questions in this election - Do we choose to treat each other with more dignity and more respect? Or do we choose more division, anger and hate?

Let's keep a leader in office who will continue to lead us through this COVID-19 crisis by working together and trusting in the science. You can watch the full Forum on the [Federation's Facebook page](https://act.myngp.com/el/p5yDV052139tgwQ2qxM2-A==/QqOr2-DAbyVfkAgN4-xi8A==?type=2&theater).

**REMINDER: **The deadline to register to vote in the General Election is October 10. Visit [ivote.de.gov](https://act.myngp.com/el/p5yDV052139tgwQ2qxM2-A==/gN3ixEiw6b9d2PmIy3cm_g==) to check your registration status or request a mail-in ballot.

subject: Absolutely shameful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
At a campaign rally on Monday, President Trump told his supporters that COVID-19 "affects virtually nobody" \-- a slap in the face to every single American who has lost a loved one to this deadly disease.
[**Help us keep the House blue, flip the Senate, and take back the White House, so we can set our country on a new trajectory | Chip in >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vq8EDJHuKXh0Tk6dHO_20opWCEkcTXsIC7P6Ip3b5Js=/iZPK6VUnr6nTIzcCnPVQ5WyXYXv2YE_sM_t9DipKn7k=?refcode=X_092320_EOQ_A)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vq8EDJHuKXh0Tk6dHO_20opWCEkcTXsIC7P6Ip3b5Js=/B8ZukW5s4uVJ8CpDW0kC7Y3xKa-gLiWBosOfhkr1InM=?refcode=X_092320_EOQ_A)
At a campaign rally on Monday, President Trump told his supporters that COVID-19 "affects virtually nobody" \-- a slap in the face to every single American who has lost a loved one to this deadly disease.
The next day, he called the 200,000 people who died from COVID-19 "a shame."
Donald Trump, enabled by a Republican-controlled Senate, has grossly mishandled this health crisis at every turn. His lack of empathy and self-awareness make him categorically unfit for office.
I am throwing my entire weight behind Joe Biden's presidential campaign -- _but, _in the chance that Trump wins re-election, I promise to stand up to him at every turn.
**There 's too much at stake for us to not give this election everything we've got. As long as I'm in Congress, I promise to represent the needs of frontline workers and working people -- but, to do that, I need your support. **
[**Can I count on you to chip in anything you can today, so I can power through to Election Day?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vq8EDJHuKXh0Tk6dHO_20opWCEkcTXsIC7P6Ip3b5Js=/iZPK6VUnr6nTIzcCnPVQ5WyXYXv2YE_sM_t9DipKn7k=?refcode=X_092320_EOQ_A)
_[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vq8EDJHuKXh0Tk6dHO_20opWCEkcTXsIC7P6Ip3b5Js=/B8ZukW5s4uVJ8CpDW0kC7Y3xKa-gLiWBosOfhkr1InM=?refcode=X_092320_EOQ_A)_
Thank you,
\-- _Linda_ _S anchez_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vq8EDJHuKXh0Tk6dHO_20opWCEkcTXsIC7P6Ip3b5Js=/_prv-vSapn9bnbTysQBoX2htpVLrsusVDr1vUI-y98Y=)

name: Kat Cammack
subject: I talked with the President about you
body:
---
| | | | | | Patriot --
I just met with President Trump and he asked how my campaign was going. I told the President the Silent Majority in this country is stronger than ever and we are standing strong with his America First agenda.
President Trump wanted me to tell you that he is going to fight the fake news media, the Deep State, and the RINOs in Congress to add a pro-life, pro-Second Amendment, and pro-America Justice to the Supreme Court.
The president asked if I could get 75 patriots to step up and commit to Keeping America Great by making a contribution.
I am sending this from my phone so let me know if this link doesn't come through: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/talked-with-the-president](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uJd3RUUA8TVHUFGHnHWW8SiLe6JJ6uAdFewA1lL6_KeK6MqEZrvv_sgkSLm2TdHTT15hh0d-ME9hM5B66OBf1eRGp_H8nRCO_iFrBO3inH3I6gb1iYodec4jLeP5syhZjruylbA7K_u6GPdF72mmIhWN2ubp_VDE0bTLNpXaRhbpwkxVUHpuDuiPUTaAaVkJ38x8Ek5r26E=&c=zsxGSk5MGK7SxYv0_2TyGClQXNvN378T6UxujpDXoVcvdUlbJ4892A==&ch=w8zIhmonttVYYvfk5tmfj2PoR5U6NbK7maOBQ51qLvs0mx4JIVwLgQ==)
I told the President I could count on your support, so please chip in what you can. We need to stand together to take on the Radical Left.
America First,
\- Kat
Sent from my iPhone

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Will you help me flood the district with 10,000 more signs?
body:
Just 41 days until Election Day... and we have boots on the ground hitting THOUSANDS of doors around district.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394274-928803-5205922-3581e0f4f1-5527961a61)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394274-928803-5205922-3581e0f4f1-5527961a61) Just 41 days until Election Day... and we have boots on the ground hitting THOUSANDS of doors around the district.

[**Will you help us put up 10,000 more "Laura Loomer for Congress" signs, by making an emergency gift of $15?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394274-928803-5205922-3581e0f4f1-5527961a61)

This race is heated and we need to be in front of every voter in the district and around EVERY corner!

Right now, teams of volunteers are knocking on doors ... making sure voters know what I stand for.

But the only way to really hit this message home? **We need to get my name plastered on every corner ... so they remember who to vote for on Election Day.**

**Our plan is to blanket Florida 's 21st District with 10,000 yard signs by November 1.** But as you can imagine, these signs aren't free and they don't put themselves up.

Each signs costs our team about $1.50 in printing costs.

[**Will you sponsor 10 signs with a gift of $15 -- or 20 signs with a gift of $30, or even 100 signs with a gift of $150--right away?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394274-928803-5205922-3581e0f4f1-5527961a61)

[**Please chip in now ... and help me win this race.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-394274-928803-5205922-3581e0f4f1-5527961a61)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Laura Loomer

They’re already talking about another impeachment. (As a note -- What grounds do they even have for an impeachment? Because last time I checked – nomi Peter, They’re already talking about another impeachment. (As a note -- What grounds do they even have for an impeachment? Because last time I checked – nominating a Justice to the Supreme Court IS the duty of the President.)
They’re already talking about how nothing is off of the table.
They’re once again, showing their TRUE colors.
And do you know who stands in line with ALL of this, Peter? My radical opponent and Nancy Pelosi’s ally Susan Wild.
In just a few short days, we will be faced with our FINAL End-of-Quarter deadline before Election Day. This is the LAST deadline we will submit to the FEC for our opponent to see how we are faring, and Peter, we need to ensure that she sees that our common-sense, conservative campaign is READY to bring back some decency to Washington.

They’re once again, showing their TRUE colors. And do you know who stands in line with ALL of this, Peter? My radical opponent and Nancy Pelosi’s ally Susan Wild. In just a few short days, we will be faced with our FINAL End-of-Quarter deadline before Election Day. This is the LAST deadline we will submit to the FEC for our opponent to see how we are faring, and Peter, we need to ensure that she sees that our common-sense, conservative campaign is READY to bring back some decency to Washington. STOP SUSAN WILD Email: Double Match: ACTIVATED I need to emphasize just how important these last few weeks are and why I need to know you stand alongside us. For the last two years, the Lehigh Valley has been under leadership from a congresswoman who continues to answer to her DC bosses, not the very people who elected her in 2018. Time is overdue for PA-07 to be represented by someone who WILL fight for them, through and through. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.
