name: Bob Menendez
subject: There will never be another Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friends --

**There will never be another Ruth Bader Ginsburg.**

She broke down gender barriers with her unstoppable tenacity, intellectual might, and an unshakeable commitment to justice.

She changed the course of history with her opinion in _U.S. v. Virginia_. She moved people to rally for justice with dissenting opinions in _Hobby Lobby_ , _Ledbetter_ , and _Shelby County_.

But Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are already maneuvering to deny the American people an opportunity to choose the president who will appoint her successor.

**We must fight back with the same might and determination she would. We must work to flip the Senate.**

That's why I'm supporting the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee in their mission to turn the Senate blue and finally put an end to Mitch McConnell's reign. We only need to pick up four seats to flip the Senate and make it happen, and the DSCC is on the front line of this mission.

**[Friends, you already know what's at stake if we don't act immediately. Can you donate $5 so we can help the DSCC flip the Senate blue and stop Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's takeover of the Supreme Court?](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae3e/1835502882/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjNfZHNjY3RhbmRlbV9pbiJ9/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_menendez_dscctandem?refcode=em20_200923_dscctandem_in")**

Women's rights, social justice, health care -- everything Ruth Bader Ginsburg fought so hard to expand and protect now hangs in the balance.

We know Donald Trump will nominate a right-wing extremist who will stand opposed to everything we hold dear. And with Mitch McConnell constantly changing the rules in his favor, there's no doubt in my mind that we'll face an uphill battle.

**But I refuse to give up hope. I didn't come to the Senate to do what is easy, I came to do what is right.**

A man who lost the popular vote by 3 million should not get to alter the balance of the Supreme Court for generations to come. And we should not be rushing to fill an open seat 41 days before a national election.

**[Let's flip the Senate. Will you join me in supporting the DSCC by donating $5 or whatever works for you?](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae3e/1835502882/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjNfZHNjY3RhbmRlbV9pbiJ9/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_menendez_dscctandem?refcode=em20_200923_dscctandem_in")**

[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae3e/1835502882/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjNfZHNjY3RhbmRlbV9pbiJ9/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_menendez_dscctandem?refcode=em20_200923_dscctandem_in") We must honor Ruth Bader Ginsburg's memory through our own pursuit of justice -- let's start by flipping the Senate.

Thank you,

Bob [DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae3e/1835502882/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA5MjNfZHNjY3RhbmRlbV9pbiJ9/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2009_email_menendez_dscctandem?refcode=em20_200923_dscctandem_in") | **Please visit and share the following links for the latest information on COVID-19:

[https://covid19.nj.gov/](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae3f/1835502882/VEsD/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://covid19.nj.gov/")
[https://www.menendez.senate.gov/coronavirus](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae20/1835502882/VEsA/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://www.menendez.senate.gov/coronavirus")
[https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542930/74d715b9/1a6c09c2/1f49ae21/1835502882/VEsB/?g=NDtPN8Qot1BcghgJFwVmbpA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**

name: Georgia Blue Project Board
subject: Another denial of justice just happened in Louisville.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
Friend,

Today’s grand jury ruling came and went without a single officer charged in Breonna Taylor’s death — just one facing charges for shooting into neighboring apartments. This is a slap in the face to the black community and to communities of color across America. They continue to try and placate us with piecemeal offerings, hoping that THIS TIME, we will fall silent.

Not only did they not charge all three officers for the murder of Breonna Taylor, they only charged Brett Hankinson with wanton endangerment in the first degree. This is a low-level felony with only a maximum penalty of 5 years. No charges of manslaughter or homicide.

They felt that a wall deserved more justice than Breonna Taylor. Her family and the memory of her life deserve better than this.

The shockwaves of this decision and its effect on precedent in terms of how police brutality is prosecuted could be massive. That is why our work is so important. We must fight to flip the U.S. Congress and the Georgia state legislature so that we can pass meaningful police reform. We must fight to replace the morally bankrupt leaders in our criminal justice system across the South.

Georgia Blue Project’s mission is to galvanize voters and make sure when they turn out, they vote Democratic up and down the ticket. We can flip Georgia blue, and by doing so change the White House, the Senate majority in Washington and even break the Republican stranglehold on our State Legislature. We can realize the change we seek in a country that too often does not seem to love Black lives, even when Black lives try so hard to love this country.

Friend, can you chip in whatever you can today, to help us stand against injustice and see our purpose through?

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Donate $26 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_26]

Donate $50 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_50]

Donate $100 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_100]

Donate $250 today>>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_250]

Donate $500 today>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_500]

Thank you for your support and commitment to realizing a brighter future for all those at risk of discrimination and persecution at the hands of the law.

—Georgia Blue Project Board
GeorgiaBlueProject.com

DONATE>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em09232020-BT-b_other]

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: A new look at the data
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Our aggressive testing strategy is picking up speed -- yesterday we preformed more than 8,200 tests. Since the start of the pandemic, we've performed over 700,000 tests. That's a lot of data. Every day, I send you the latest data dashboard from the Rhode Island Department of Health. Today's looks a little different than it has in the past. We're adding new features to the dashboard going forward.
I want to discuss some of the additions, what they mean, and how this will make it easier to understand the trends we're seeing.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MTJqYjDpl4a-Et65ZwZXiqmsXmzxWa9pjKTpo19RwSVF9YGSh8CU5XOiKz2R7gEzrQNBJj9Z4wsCm0-9Pg3gfXj8SC2wWz1bpXPkBKlWqdZ05TXHcjRbcvwcjDRZ_Bg_hRXVF36ofYZZ1PJ9STbypYzObQ9bwzso5gLwWbSdc7n-QO8QsTr4vqggBfnIijXAhLw05JIfu0M=&c=HIOVlU1vyMHiQvKJG9H8mJG1POsn9OegtXbFUgoluoNqVQZnEqIA8g==&ch=SxuTelvSwf1KyC8D37BOC7apGLEA084N3X2z7t-q3ApnOFrrPQLlMw==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MTJqYjDpl4a-Et65ZwZXiqmsXmzxWa9pjKTpo19RwSVF9YGSh8CU5XOiKz2R7gEzrQNBJj9Z4wsCm0-9Pg3gfXj8SC2wWz1bpXPkBKlWqdZ05TXHcjRbcvwcjDRZ_Bg_hRXVF36ofYZZ1PJ9STbypYzObQ9bwzso5gLwWbSdc7n-QO8QsTr4vqggBfnIijXAhLw05JIfu0M=&c=HIOVlU1vyMHiQvKJG9H8mJG1POsn9OegtXbFUgoluoNqVQZnEqIA8g==&ch=SxuTelvSwf1KyC8D37BOC7apGLEA084N3X2z7t-q3ApnOFrrPQLlMw==).
---
| You'll notice that the numbers we've been tracking the past few months -- the number of tests, positive cases, hospitalizations, etc. -- are still on the left side of the screen. But as we head into our seventh month fighting this virus, I also think it's important to be able to quickly and easily see the trends over time. Since the beginning, I've made it my goal to always share where we were, where we are, and where we're going. This new data dashboard helps us better visualize those trends.
In the updated dashboard, you'll see graphs showing three weekly metrics over the past 8 weeks. At the top is the average percent positive rate, in the middle is new hospitalizations, and at the bottom is new cases per 100,000 residents. Every Tuesday, these three graphs will be updated to display the previous week's data.
You'll also notice a red line on each of the three graphs. This line represents the threshold above which we need to consider imposing new restrictions. To be clear, this does not mean we will only impose new restrictions if we are above that threshold. As we've done all along, we're taking a targeted and data-driven approach based on the trends we're seeing, and if we need to tighten restrictions in one particular area, we'll do that. But these red lines give us a sense of when we might need to consider across-the-board restrictions once again, including the possibility of moving back a phase.
Finally, in the right column, you'll see trend arrows comparing each of those three data points to the previous week. These new arrows will make it easier to tell at a glance where our state is doing well and where we need to improve.
Throughout this pandemic, we've always worked to go above and beyond with our data. Transparency is critical; the more we know about what's happening with the virus, the better we can stay ahead of it. I'm proud that the COVID Tracking Project gives Rhode Island an A+ for our data quality, and we're always looking for ways to report more data in a way that's clear and actionable. I hope that today's update to the data dashboard makes it easier for you to see exactly what's going on in our state.
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MTJqYjDpl4a-Et65ZwZXiqmsXmzxWa9pjKTpo19RwSVF9YGSh8CU5dTIjiRmJKDZ4IDDaOFjmCa_30Q343RGh8F91y7SW01mXuuOUkqTq376MKy3bOVaSF2wPW994v9LP27jbxS_HlrTTrq7v7o9DUjQL6W6JxRBGO5049rnpXz4aarE9HIWvVHJ-X_fk0mvRwIEf8JwKwhMlM3tGPwCUG531Iog9lxaV941ALyjMcr09u_B7BDw-zMRdaPP4N_8y9c2qOlM4PiDd5aBXmFniTDodfQa16odbWQ9uffsYsaFN-x3o_Xw_e8miuHSFloQGLxWatQZT6g=&c=HIOVlU1vyMHiQvKJG9H8mJG1POsn9OegtXbFUgoluoNqVQZnEqIA8g==&ch=SxuTelvSwf1KyC8D37BOC7apGLEA084N3X2z7t-q3ApnOFrrPQLlMw==).

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Fletcher Threatens Texas' Energy Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Fletcher's Leadership Puts Texas' Energy Future At Risk**

With Democrats in Congress pushing to dismantle Texas' oil and gas industry, it is more important than ever that Houston has an advocate who will safeguard this vital industry. Under the leadership of Speaker Pelosi, who Representative Lizzie Fletcher supports 99% of the time, the socialist _Green New Deal_ has become a mainstream element of the Democrat party platform. And, if Democrats get their way and implement this reckless legislation, the consequences will be catastrophic for Houston: **electricity costs will[increase](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=07f5842b8ba34d8297c569238008b15a&_e=LJrXlmm5LiIzwmUIZA56_RPoHFXiT3x1y7DalapWMAleNBI7mCzeCZ5lJRhRJqhW5hpUGQueWdMChIH9xaai6SjikCDWDq24MDpnoy9VbhEHpvTumg1YdoRW0up6wwRt3UJZR239A-9rM9mnyrIljco7BXSt5qlyyM516QfjoTbj57MVLdayU7adqKonCo6M_SvHTMLTcHas3XRd0Ezroq5eF8rLWW1U0KmlEuDKF1rukzETqTKTriKCPTuUcaxHPrDSVPgDcpuEkHGFSbVsR1GrTZJTv24qw_CjBQHudNor9SVPWR6XZW7H15pu8GMbaIR5-cH4q28hhNUX2WFn0aypbb-8GTEUHqDtmjcHSHc%3D) by 900% and cost Texas $120 billion per year; Texas will [lose](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=07f5842b8ba34d8297c569238008b15a&_e=LJrXlmm5LiIzwmUIZA56_SS1biIiIESgKPqbhaZWStnTWmMqfWg9-qamILMBh5n0lYm4vcNw7mQ4VTyF2wyHANMGxL6ePdpnbkiRc1Q5ugshNKf20GycopJL2zy1EXU_GcIQWMWStr2mDZbBj70JQJKnX1HMCswZzFixb37W92QFcK-dXQC10KozLCmcTtk15nlASy1bOqQbwRT0twW0f7SV31TQnzCJplqI1nNAVooxZ6UCKDn9obnoNCOWekDpRSAs3phpApTj47Gk4cCqBYCN6kqARAo4tCeFtsaTi7MZ89UpJ1cE3psjDIZ8FwBifei-q2ss6cF35rKavd40FrW5WcoljYGtJHd8I-8eu0o%3D) millions of jobs;** America will no longer be energy independent; and, consumers will be left with expensive and unreliable energy.

That's why today, Hunt for Congress announced our newest TV ad, _Energy_ , highlighting Lizzie Fletcher's failure to protect Houston's energy industry.

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=07f5842b8ba34d8297c569238008b15a&_e=Dplnv4lSfir0yTH2f9LTRcQ-2D24EJfUd46xua_yrvbo_LLO0w8uk7-w-i6TPxUtQk81Yepon38Tm-qxX_V2jarRDzqjx8mG36PXytI01xsCycSpAqr4zwSK8HreJj7c6IGW_Q1xaATb95Kgefxfm1TPvjBSFqrE7AxORLYHsR3qKE4PAChMHhy7tw8odn-nrKucisfEuGIw5sMcGUc0uUetOm540NuI5-Sdm7qoYg7C9kz3kLhg3OT0c8hkoUZjFeEl4cjEAn183000-xEZPdg4aiEnLjbq53eMPlWvkJu_SH49H5d60u_PbPlCAmIR)
[Click here to watch _Energy_.](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=07f5842b8ba34d8297c569238008b15a&_e=Dplnv4lSfir0yTH2f9LTRcQ-2D24EJfUd46xua_yrvbo_LLO0w8uk7-w-i6TPxUtQk81Yepon38Tm-qxX_V2jarRDzqjx8mG36PXytI01xudRnfNjsgrnpToZQNodkbYjsI8aq-1CTltEotnYHklJA6YOG_Kolkiuhp7y6n63cV3YRTsT3rCwSIUm7XCOjZ1b9ZIKF97T4Cs6CRe1v7-XRQ0lqQCvKChyZWcT7C8PmmisaWJEYUC3KfOsHYqTWgESlH21YcwYQ1f66CGHpRjkWGp4ZS1ZfLNwg2mgzzlYrOLGbCgq4xA7yS_v0ofmuEh)

There is one clear choice in this race who will empower the brilliant men and women of Houston's energy industry to continue innovating.

Wesley understands the critical role Texas' energy economy plays in the lives of Houstonians and he will fight to ensure both the industry and the consumers who depend on it are protected from destructive government overreach. The residents of the 7th District don't need more empty promises or complacency; they need a leader whose support for Houston is commensurate with the hard work and ingenuity of the Texans who have made Houston the energy capital of the world. Wesley Hunt is the only candidate up to the task.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=07f5842b8ba34d8297c569238008b15a&_e=Dplnv4lSfir0yTH2f9LTRQCr-zS1tarnxri6BrZDzNVoxWGihRGsZnTNuCDRzCGjYmc5ohzn7L3WvXIKzvw6KOoRFKgdeiw_RbzgDt5PGVAJVAjkjRIyoQYWQ53StZfb0X_XVXqj080xW4-EFHfSbr2WlykLFna6pgnKcEA5Pvi77lCKiNBux1DEFyPH3U7bgWQfNNWxU03BznHy9lmec8LWsxohPPrFJiNVUec7rBhK6ReGQ_GB5v-0nm86_CdnylolWq3ACDrXBVI_tb4AyyPtz5CDWHoVJeIsF5o_wvc%3D)****

body:
| | | |

| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

My opponent, **Colin Allred, campaigned as "an independent voice for North Texas** \- not a party line politician." But **he broke that promise as soon as he got to DC.**

**It is simply not possible for Colin Allred to be "independent" while voting with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time.**

If you agree, [please contribute $100, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=9e7c13ea6e&e=68aaeb0998), to help me keep my new ad, "Promise" on the air!

| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=9e3fca38c0&e=68aaeb0998 "Genevieve Collins - "Promise"")
---
| It's time we are represented by a member of Congress who keeps their promises and is focused on serving YOU.

**I'm not a politician; I'm a businesswoman who will go to Congress to solve problems, and help North Texans get back to work.**

[Our district is ready for a new direction. Help us spread our message and keep our latest TV ad on the air.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=91a8a01457&e=68aaeb0998) Every dollar helps, and no amount is too small!

name: Team Warner
subject: Debate tonight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We hope you will tune in with us tonight!
|
---

| | Derek --

**Mark Warner 's first debate with his Republican opponent is about to air.**

We hope you'll join us for the debate -- Mark is looking forward to discussing his proven track record of delivering results that make life better for _every_ Virginian. During his time in the Senate, Mark has led the charge on coronavirus relief, worked to make affordable health care accessible, and pushed to ensure every Virginian can succeed in our new tech-driven economy.

Mark's opponent Daniel Gade, on the other hand, wants to roll back the progress we've made in Virginia. He'll be a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda. Virginia needs an independent fighter in the Senate, someone who is loyal to their constituents -- that person is Mark Warner.

We're less than 45 days away from Election Day, when we'll have the opportunity to re-elect Mark, flip the Senate blue, and elect Democrats up and down the ticket. In order to keep Mark in his seat in the Senate we need your help.

[**Please consider contributing to help send Mark Warner back to the Senate -- every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85dab9/53d9897e/559b3dae/1c8814d8/384531754/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debatenight?refcode=20200923_f_1_nd__810__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

We hope you will tune in with us tonight! Together, we can protect the progress we've made in Virginia by re-electing Mark Warner. **If you can, please consider chipping in to keep Mark in the Senate and keep Virginia blue.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We hope you will tune in with us tonight! | | | Derek -- Mark Warner 's first debate with his Republican opponent is about to air. We hope you'll join us for the debate -- Mark is looking forward to discussing his proven track record of delivering results that make life better for every Virginian. During his time in the Senate, Mark has led the charge on coronavirus relief, worked to make affordable health care accessible, and pushed to ensure every Virginian can succeed in our new tech-driven economy. Mark's opponent Daniel Gade, on the other hand, wants to roll back the progress we've made in Virginia. He'll be a rubber stamp for the Trump agenda. Virginia needs an independent fighter in the Senate, someone who is loyal to their constituents -- that person is Mark Warner. We're less than 45 days away from Election Day, when we'll have the opportunity to re-elect Mark, flip the Senate blue, and elect Democrats up and down the ticket. In order to keep Mark in his seat in the Senate we need your help. "" We hope you will tune in with us tonight! Together, we can protect the progress we've made in Virginia by re-electing Mark Warner. name: Trump Flight Confirmation Alert | Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Flight #2020GA to Atlanta
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Donald Trump is flying to Georgia Friday |
---
Donald Trump is panicking, friend!

Last week, he dispatched Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. to Georgia.

Then, he sent Ivanka Trump and Bill Barr to Georgia earlier this week!

**And if all that wasn't enough,_Donald Trump himself_ is now heading to Georgia _THIS FRIDAY_ for a photo op with _David Perdue!!!_**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe6/5b2c1286/3a81ae1c/25f38743/1834966024/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_23_trump_visit_img")
**[Friend, can you make a donation before Trump lands in Georgia? We need to show Trump that visiting Georgia isn't going to salvage his dwindling support here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe6/5b2c1286/3a81ae1c/25f38742/1834966024/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_23_trump_visit")**
| | [DONATE BEFORE HE ARRIVES](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe6/5b2c1286/3a81ae1c/25f38742/1834966024/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_23_trump_visit")
---

Why is he doing all of this? He's **_terrified_** of losing Georgia -- and he knows that's a real possibility.

Recent polling has Donald Trump TIED with Joe Biden in Georgia, and Democrat Jon Ossoff TIED with Trump's "favorite Senator," David Perdue!

**Democrats keep gaining on Republicans here, and Trump knows the path to the White House runs straight through Georgia._He can't win without this state._**

It's do or die for Republicans here -- but for Georgia Democrats, we're just getting started. _In the June primary, Georgia Democrats broke voter turnout records and OUTNUMBERED Republicans._

**That's why Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling so much money and effort into Georgia, friend, and that's exactly why we can't let up.**

**[Chip in $20 right now to help us keep our momentum going.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe6/5b2c1286/3a81ae1c/25f38745/1834966024/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_23_trump_visit&amount=20")**

| [CHIP IN $20 NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2fe6/5b2c1286/3a81ae1c/25f38745/1834966024/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_23_trump_visit?refcode=em_2020_09_23_trump_visit&amount=20")

subject: Dog Days of the Campaign 🐶

body:
In honor of National Dogs in Politics Day, we thought we'd introduce you to our own puppy who is making a big splash on the campaign trail. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8c87c4eac0&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Today is National Dogs in Politics Day, so I thought I'd introduce you to this 9-month-old bundle of pure joy Rita and I adopted in March.
---
| |
---
Rita and I both agree we are better people because of the example of unconditional love and companionship that our dogs have provided through the years.

We lost Wicklow, our little Irish Chihuahua, this past winter. Mamean came into our lives in March and has filled our hearts with joy and happiness. Her playful character makes us laugh every day.
---
| While small, she makes a big splash on the campaign trail. Just see for yourself below!

So today, in honor of all the dogs out there, would you mind throwing our campaign a bone?

---

Team Hackett

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH LIVE at 6 p.m. ET: President Trump holds news conference
body:
President Trump will hold a news briefing this evening at 6 p.m. ET to discuss the economy, jobs gains, vaccine development, and more. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fe568bfc6f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH LIVE at 6 p.m. ET: President Trump holds news conference**

**President Trump** will hold a news briefing this evening at 6 p.m. ET to discuss the economy, jobs gains, vaccine development, and more. Click the link below to watch live or to see a video of the briefing after its conclusion.

[**Click here to watch.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b4c999b21&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: America will never be a socialist or communist country!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=928f8128ce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Today, President Trump** honored veterans of the Bay of Pigs Invasion, who in 1961 fought bravely against the Castro regime in a struggle for liberty over tyranny.

“**We will honor** your courage with my Administration’s determination to defeat communism and socialism,” President Trump said.

**As part of America’s** continuing fight against oppressive socialist regimes, President Trump announced today that the U.S. Treasury will prohibit American travelers from staying at properties owned by the Cuban government. The United States will also further restrict the importation of Cuban alcohol and tobacco products.

**“These actions** will ensure that U.S. dollars do not fund the Cuban regime and go directly to the Cuban people,” President Trump said. “Big difference.”

**The President** also recognized [**Hispanic Heritage Month**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c436671fa4&e=3ee4985eea). Nearly 60,000 Hispanic Americans serve as police officers, and more than 300,000 are part of our great American military. Over half of U.S. Border Patrol agents are of Hispanic heritage, as well.

**“Hispanic Americans** teach their children to love our country, honor our history, and respect our great American flag. Hispanic Americans embody the American Dream.”

**🎬** [**America will never be a socialist or communist country!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fdd1927599&e=3ee4985eea)

**🎬** [**Something to share: Hispanic Americans make our country strong!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30f82fb99b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
# **Press Secretary: Democrats again show their disregard for our Constitution**

**Press** **Secretary Kayleigh McEnany** called out Democrat leaders Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez yesterday for their “blatant disregard for the United States Constitution.”

**Their latest stunt** : “Apparently, it is now a high crime and misdemeanor worthy of impeachment for a lawfully elected President of the United States to exercise his constitutional duty” to nominate a Supreme Court justice, McEnany said.

**Of** **the nearly 30 times** a Supreme Court vacancy has occurred during a presidential election year, the sitting president has made a nomination in _every single instance._

**🎬** [**Democrats now view impeachment as a partisan political tool**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=46b6e3c5f1&e=3ee4985eea)

**To block President Trump** and the Senate majority from filling the Supreme Court vacancy, House Democrats and their media allies have threatened a second impeachment—or, if that isn’t enough, to “blow up the entire system.”

**“This President will proceed** undaunted by Democrat threats. President Trump will fulfill his duty. President Trump will appoint the next Supreme Court justice.”

**🎬** [**Watch the Press Secretary’s statement**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=944e62370b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks honoring Bay of Pigs veterans** | September 23, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3c97eb80d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59ae44965e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=39f8ff038c)
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?VGVycnnigJlzIGlQaG9uZSA=?=
subject: Did you see this, Derek? FW: URGENT: Trump is coming to Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, Did you see my email earlier today? Donald Trump is holding one of his super spreader MAGA rallies in Virginia THIS FRIDAY. Before his rally, I want to send Trump the message that Virginians are more fired up than ever to put an end to his reckless clown show this November. name: MJ Hegar
subject: I'm humbled and ready to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f03/7f51f7bc/45ad9ccd/4efa6c86/2092550409/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Friday's news was devastating, Peter.

**Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a trailblazing fighter for justice. Her life of service and fierce dedication to equality changed my life and the lives of millions of women who knew they could do more than what anyone gave them credit for. Her legacy is one that will shape America for generations -- and while the news of her passing was gutting, I also feel an immense amount of hope.**

In the hours after the news broke, a groundswell of support started pouring into our campaign. Hour after hour, throughout the entire weekend, tens of thousands everyday Americans joined our campaign and pitched in what they could. In a moment of darkness, people showed our campaign that they believe in a better future, **[and that they're willing to fight for it.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f03/7f51f7bc/45ad9ccd/4efa6c85/2092550409/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200923.3nd__2179__&amount=10")**

I'm humbled to say that **nearly 200,000 new donors** joined our grassroots team this past weekend. The outpouring of support is staggering, and I'm ready to fight like hell to win -- because the stakes are too high to do any less.

It's our job to carry on her legacy now, Peter. **[Will you join nearly 200,000 other new members of our grassroots army and defeat Sen. Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f03/7f51f7bc/45ad9ccd/4efa6c85/2092550409/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNzkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200923.3nd__2179__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

| Hi , We can depend on few things in life, but the support and protection of law enforcement officers is one of them. I have stood hand in hand with our brave police my entire career in the Senate. I am proud to continue doing so in the face of anti-cop hysteria from the left. **Democrats want to defund the police. I want to defend the police.** That is why our campaign put together our most recent commercial. I want all Oklahomans to know that law enforcement can always count on my support. [**Help me get this ad on the air and support our police with a quick $30 donation to our campaign right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTE2ODY0MTc2NzM4Mjc2Nzk5JmM9bThtMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTU1ODA1MTYmZD15OW0zaTdu.W5xDIvwZv1WVqDVwEbPQYKWN48klpVIw5MKSXw7Y5sM)

| |

| [](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTE2ODY0MTc2NzM4Mjc2Nzk5JmM9bThtMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTU1ODA1MTkmZD1xOXkyejht.ctAXHEoy5h8oMtJ_5RZS9n9ewSYjSkBrK4Z8DZb-tE0)
---
---
| |
---
| Liberal cities across our country have been burning for months. Democrats have failed to protect the lives and property of their constituents.
We can not let that violence continue to spread. We must restore law and order, and that begins with supporting our police instead of tearing them down. **Now is the time for all Oklahomans to come together and back the blue.** [**Join our campaign with a one time donation of $45 or more today to help me get this message out to the voters who will be deciding this race.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTE2ODY0MTc2NzM4Mjc2Nzk5JmM9bThtMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTU1ODA1MjImZD1qNWk2bDdo.Anw0JJWhKWa8UAe1tRDzryh2z_B-oXQi7Hesh4Jn6k0) Democrats are spending millions trying to flip the Senate this year, and if they do, the first thing they will push is legislation to defund our police. Stand with me today, and together we will defeat them.
---
---
| |
---
| | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTE2ODY0MTc2NzM4Mjc2Nzk5JmM9bThtMCZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTU1ODA1MjgmZD1uMG84dzBu.UzuYa9MDOSxnFUaFwu147ZEHyvVuY_rn8XS5l8GYwrM)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Breaking: Indiana entering Stage 5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb shared some BIG news today. As you know, he’s been looking at the health data – and together, we’ve made progress. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friends,

Governor Holcomb shared some **BIG** news today.

As you know, he’s been looking at the health data – and together, we’ve made progress. Our state’s 7-day positivity rate has dropped to 3.9%.

And with that progress comes the news that:

**Indiana is entering into Stage 5 of Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan.**

Governor Holcomb explains what this means for Hoosiers:
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a4ca584f726942dbb69de99c010026c1&_e=qVQgN32PTzgNiSyADtZbOuA9kaMKI0oRJGz_NMr7u1_4nDrTEbNHU0iAB5u6CrBV0I88QKMrmIXTfpkK5gcn21dj6QOeOOMgXCYWjf8Y-TmuJqF8yHtWNWff9I1WGNYg6AqDUsw2hK9ragd1HPaX8lSbCf7jGmY22R8zRBfWVXprbSmtMn7EXNtmoLS3NfwekFn2-TxAYpkG1ue8aYrsMSnBlv68OL78TyiCHx-v4N3Etzowa4QaZaH7HywfHTVe-EJOczPNqH8B_J4T_cfZLN4h0IlkU4eL4tYpONvC_997id2ihSmaxjhP4XecP_WFiJsryAA7bUZdcePwy_aczQf4TTaJWDxlv9rrFTHD322lQ-va9rKRDk-W7HbTJNqLWtT_zcMFx3de7MlLg-pEAGRSxlBoa7xKLYP3m8Tax5Uf3J78jwnRyTVImaWRb899hPPP9Uv1JLl5TU-75n88DbelncikGmyJR8n6gdr6HPE%3D)
[**WATCH: Governor Holcomb Explains Stage 5**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a4ca584f726942dbb69de99c010026c1&_e=qVQgN32PTzgNiSyADtZbOuA9kaMKI0oRJGz_NMr7u1_4nDrTEbNHU0iAB5u6CrBV0I88QKMrmIXTfpkK5gcn21dj6QOeOOMgXCYWjf8Y-TmuJqF8yHtWNWff9I1WGNYg6AqDUsw2hK9ragd1HPaX8lSbCf7jGmY22R8zRBfWVXprbSmtMn7EXNtmoLS3NfwekFn2-TxAYpkG1ue8aYrsMSnBlv68OL78TyiCHx-v4N3Etzowa4QaZaH7HywfHTVe-EJOczPNqH8B_J4T_cfZLNJy5Qgilj4ovQUTpBjmL515rtN1HDw3Ah3YO0gZ0HD0gLL68ahbKPt_gZcgZTjd_9Hmu9LSc6Rb2hzuVaDLjaTjDOJ52L3S4ZkLQ_uLiHNY7OQvPd5nFFRlNHM1Y1d8dZrIygFqlLYd_VOawKHn5YjYsr1fPTHM3q-OntH_ZhS2BRlIlGm4gydkd9N4zDBFVIJGbw32k16MkYx3uIw867g%3D)
Here’s a quick breakdown:
* Continue to maintain social distancing
* Wash your hands and stay home if you’re sick
* Events of more than 500 people must receive sign-off from local health department on written plan
* Full capacity: restaurants, bars and nightclubs (with social distancing)
* Bar patrons must use seating
* Personal services and fitness centers may resume normal operations
* Size limitations removed for social gatherings and meetings
* Indoor and outdoor venues open at full capacity
* Nursing homes & assisted living facilities required to offer visitation hours
* Face coverings still required

Stage 5 begins this Saturday. Together as Hoosiers, we’ve made it to Stage 5 because of your commitment to our state – which includes your continued efforts to make smart choices about your health and the health of your friends, neighbors, coworkers and fellow Hoosiers.

**We cannot stop now. COVID-19 is not over.**

So, Hoosiers, let’s all keep doing our part.

_**“We ought to be real proud to be Hoosiers in this state... When you think about where we are compared to a lot of other states... We don’t get here by accident. We got here by working together...” – Governor Eric Holcomb**_

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew
